text: Entering this glass-walled, sunlit corridor, a sensation of anticipation stirs within me—my curiosity pulls me forward, aligned with the calm energy of a controlled environment. The second room immerses me in a landscape of ideas: vibrant patterns, thoughtful displays, and glowing words about research and development. I feel inspired, almost uplifted, seeing spaces where knowledge and wonder intersect so vividly. It reminds me how inquiry and creativity are essential companions on the journey to meaning.
